title: Arrhenius Kinetics Iter-3: 9-Step Protocol on GPT-4o-mini with Two-Token Dominance Test
layman_summary: Tests whether AI models follow a physics Arrhenius energy law at different temperatures; finds GPT-4o-mini is too accurate on MMLU-Pro to produce enough recoverable errors for a powered test — a disconfirmation result.
summary: Implemented the full 9-step Arrhenius temperature-selection protocol (iter-3) on MMLU-Pro using GPT-4o-mini via OpenRouter. Primary model candidates (Qwen-2.5-7B, Llama-3.1-8B) were disqualified after smoke testing revealed logprob access failures across all tested providers (Together, Fireworks, Lambda, Nebius, DeepInfra, Groq, Cloudflare); only GPT-4o-mini (Azure backend) reliably returned top_logprobs. A critical OC-detection bug was identified and fixed: using argmax_letter(top_logprobs) instead of extract_letter(response) caused spurious OC classifications since top_logprobs reflect T=1 softmax while actual greedy generation uses raw logit argmax. After fixing, the experiment ran on 700 MMLU-Pro examples (200 pilot / 450 main / 50 catalysis). Key results: Pilot gate FAILED (rising_frac=0.04, threshold 0.30) — only 4% of OC instances showed rising P_hat from T=0.1→0.5. Main scan found 11 genuine OC instances from 450 main examples (2.4% OC rate). Temperature sweep (7 temps × 50 samples per instance) yielded 2/11 valid Arrhenius fits (18%), median R²=0.691, fraction R²>0.85=0.50. Two-token dominance test: NOT confirmed (insufficient sample for correlation; rho_ea_delta=N/A, cv_log_A=N/A). Best-of-N comparison: T_op_approx_delta and fixed_T1.0 tied at 0.811 accuracy, T_op_regression worst at 0.415. T_TURN=0.2. Ea→T_pref correlation: N/A (insufficient fits). Catalysis test: 1 instance, inconclusive. Scientific interpretation: disconfirmation per fallback FB5 — GPT-4o-mini's high accuracy (~90% on MMLU-Pro) produces too few OC instances with sufficient logprob recovery probability to power the Arrhenius test. The Arrhenius framework requires a weaker model with higher baseline error rates. Total cost: $0.759 (well within $8 limit). All output files schema-validated against exp_gen_sol_out. Checkpoint-resume implemented throughout; async aiohttp with Semaphore(10) for concurrent API calls.
